NAS OS 4 & Consumer Apps

Role

Platform
Web App & Mobile
  • Set experience direction for consumer and business NAS products, contributing to improved Amazon star ratings.
  • Designed information architecture for NAS OS 4 to support 3rd-party applications, expanding total available market.
  • Managed European-based design contractors to meet project deadlines.
  • Improved user satisfaction by converting support feedback into feature enhancements.
